name: Cardiology
summary: Heart and cardiovascular care for chest pain, blood pressure, heart rhythm concerns, and long-term heart health.
overview: The Cardiology Department supports patients with prevention, diagnosis, treatment, and follow-up for heart and blood vessel conditions. Care includes risk assessment, ECG review, hypertension management, cholesterol planning, and support after cardiac events.

name: Neurology
summary: Brain, nerve, and nervous system care for headaches, seizures, weakness, numbness, and memory concerns.
overview: The Neurology Department evaluates conditions affecting the brain, spinal cord, nerves, and muscles. Patients receive structured assessment, care planning, medication review, and referrals for imaging or tests when needed.

name: Pediatrics
summary: Healthcare for babies, children, and teenagers, including growth checks, vaccines, illness care, and parent guidance.
overview: The Pediatrics Department provides child-centered care from infancy through adolescence. The team supports preventive visits, acute illness care, nutrition, development, school health, and family education.

name: Dentistry
summary: Oral health care for tooth pain, gum problems, checkups, cleaning, fillings, and dental procedures.
overview: The Dentistry Department helps patients protect oral health through preventive care, diagnosis, treatment, and education. Services support comfort, function, and long-term dental wellness.

name: Ophthalmology
summary: Eye and vision care for blurred vision, eye pain, infections, glasses checks, and chronic eye conditions.
overview: The Ophthalmology Department provides medical eye care, vision assessment, and monitoring for eye conditions. Patients can receive examination, treatment plans, and specialist referral when required.

name: Orthopedics
summary: Bone, joint, muscle, and mobility care for pain, injury, arthritis, fractures, and rehabilitation.
overview: The Orthopedics Department manages musculoskeletal concerns with assessment, imaging referral, treatment planning, and recovery support. Care focuses on movement, pain control, and function.

name: OB-GYN
summary: Women's reproductive health, pregnancy care, menstrual concerns, contraception guidance, and preventive screening.
overview: The OB-GYN Department supports women through preventive visits, pregnancy, reproductive health needs, and gynecological concerns. Care is confidential, respectful, and coordinated.

name: General Practice
summary: Primary care for everyday health concerns, prevention, chronic conditions, referrals, and care coordination.
overview: General Practice is the first stop for most health needs. The team handles common illnesses, preventive care, chronic disease follow-up, health education, and referrals to specialists.

name: Mental Health
summary: Support for stress, anxiety, depression, sleep concerns, emotional wellbeing, and care planning.
overview: The Mental Health Department provides compassionate support for emotional and psychological wellbeing. Care may include assessment, counseling referral, coping plans, medication review, and follow-up.

name: Emergency Care
summary: Urgent care for serious symptoms, injuries, breathing problems, severe pain, and sudden changes in health.
overview: Emergency Care is for conditions that may require immediate medical attention. MediBridge helps patients understand warning signs and connect with urgent services quickly.
